name: Varicella Disease History Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for varicella (chickenpox) disease and personal history of varicella. A documented history of varicella disease may exempt a child from the varicella vaccination requirement in childhood immunization status (CIS) and immunizations for adolescents (IMA) measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Personal history of other infectious and parasitic diseases (used for history of chickenpox/varicella)
Personal history of other infectious and parasitic diseases
